creator: rometravelers
caption:
Found such a cozy little spot in Rome! 🍝✨

Ostevia just opened last November and feels tucked away from the crowds while still being close to everything. The kind of place where you sit down for dinner and accidentally stay way longer than planned.

Really good pasta, warm atmosphere, and perfect for a slower lunch or dinner night in Rome. 😌

📍Via del Mascherino 64, Rome

Save and share with a friend you want to go with this summer! ☀️
